system.description:
She's old, she's sour, and she has a reputation for jailing Duskvol's criminals. As thin and hard as an iron poker, she relentlessly pursues her cases, bending the law with a passionate hatred of scoundrels. She runs a special unit of Inspectors dedicated to investigating her cases, run by Inspector Ulek.

If she is taking a case personally (as she often does) she may hire outsiders to acquire or create evidence. She also conducts a brutal war of counter-intelligence against rogues looking to free their associates.
